summary.name: call_loop
summary.description:
Decision flow from which a loop is called.
The loop will stop after 5 iterations although the control dg has 10 rows.

summary.name: set_max_loop
summary.description: Initialize the loop control datagrid with max number of iterations

summary.name: loop
summary.description: Loop body. Sequence of nodes executed in the loop.

summary.name: Set_Stop_Loop
summary.description: Set flag to stop loop early.
